name: Demande de prix
metaModel.name: PurchaseOrder
subject: Demande de cotation Nﺡﺍ $PurchaseOrder.PurchaseOrderSeq$
content:
Bonjour,

Vous trouverez ci-joint notre demande de cotation Nﺡﺍ $PurchaseOrder.PurchaseOrderSeq$.

Merci de nous indiquer pour chaque produit le dﺣ۸lai de livraison et les conditions de paiements.

name: Price inquiry
metaModel.name: PurchaseOrder
subject: Request for quotation Nﺡﺍ $PurchaseOrder.PurchaseOrderSeq$
content:
Good morning,

Please find attached our request for quotation Nﺡﺍ $PurchaseOrder.PurchaseOrderSeq$.

Can you please indicate to us for each product the expected delivery date and if some products are subjected to special discounts.

Best regards
$PurchaseOrder.buyerUser.partner.firstName$ $PurchaseOrder.buyerUser.partner.name$

name: Supplier reminder for overdue purchase order lines
metaModel.name: Partner
subject: Overdue purchase order lines
content:
Dear $Partner.simpleFullName$,

We are writing to follow up on the following overdue purchase order lines. Please confirm the revised delivery schedule or advise us of any delays:

$overdueLines:{ line | }$
Purchase Order Product Ordered Qty Received Qty Estimated Receipt Date
$line.purchaseOrder.purchaseOrderSeq$ $line.productName$ $line.qty; format="%,10.2f"$$if(line.unit)$ $line.unit.labelToPrinting$$endif$ $line.receivedQty; format="%,10.2f"$$if(line.unit)$ $line.unit.labelToPrinting$$endif$ $line.estimatedReceiptDate; format="dd/MM/yyyy"$

Please do not hesitate to contact us should you have any questions.

Best regards,
$__user__.activeCompany.name$
